## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Webflow's content strategy for developers and integrations, aligning on approach and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need for a separate developer-focused content property with distinct branding/messaging](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2808.0)
  - [Integration pages to proceed, with design review by Webflow's web team](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Headless CMS content likely to remain on main blog, targeting marketers/decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)
  - [Developer-focused content requires clearer audience definition and conversion goals](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [\~60 integration pages generated so far](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Design template created in Figma, awaiting Webflow web team review](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Content mapped for 700-800 potential integrations](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Next steps: Webflow web team to review design, determine build ownership](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Developer Content Strategy

  - [Rachel advocated for separate developer-focused content property](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Current blog doesn't resonate with developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2541.0)
  - [Need to define target developer segments (e.g. agency partners, WordPress converts)](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Conversion goals differ from main site (e.g. API token registration vs sign-up)](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Concerns about potential cannibalization between developer content and main blog](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2946.0)
  - [Need to evaluate pros/cons of subdomain vs subfolder structure](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)
  - [Domain authority impact to be assessed](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2926.0)

### Content Mapping and Audience Definition

  - [Some proposed topics more suitable for main blog vs developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2107.0)
  - [Need to align on specific developer segments being targeted](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [Clarify user journeys and conversion flows for developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

### Webflow Cloud Positioning

  - [New offering requires distinct messaging for developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)
  - [Opportunity to differentiate from headless CMS + hosting stack (e.g. Contentful + Vercel)](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review integration page designs with Webflow web/creative team](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Align on developer content topics, audience segments, and user journeys in upcoming meeting](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2954.0)
  - [Evaluate SEO impact of various content structure options](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)
  - [Involve Luke (developer product marketing) in content strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=3310.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine content proposals based on clearer audience/journey definitions](https://fathom.video/share/LZKBC4Tqo1FcmcMn8RCYjZq8qV4esYvy?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
